steps.assistant_text: List-walk guard leaf (early-return shape, NOT a bundle — branches cross the first jr ra). 2 levers: (1) dead in-guard q=arg1 reassignment flips p/q<->c0 coalescing so p->$v1, legalizing move v1,a0 in the *arg1 guard's delay (plain beq, kills beqzl+sltu dup = the extra word); (2) int r=0 dead initializer colors the epilogue bool into $v1 not $a0.
